name: Hazelnut Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 ounces Hazelnuts; toasted, skinned and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Butter a 9-inch bundt pan.
3. Sift together cocoa powder, flour, baking powder and salt. Set aside.
4. Cream together softened butter and sugar using an electric mixer on medium speed until light and fluffy.
5. Add eggs one at a time, beating after each addition. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. Mix together buttermilk and water.
7. Alternately fold the cocoa mixture and buttermilk mixture into the butter mixture, starting and ending with the dry ingredients.
8. Stir in hazelnuts.
9. Spread batter evenly in prepared pan.
10. Bake for 30 minutes or until a skewer inserted in the center comes out clean.
11. Cool cake completely before inverting onto a rack.
Coffee-Cinnamon Cream:
1. In a large bowl, mix together cream cheese, heavy whipping cream, vanilla extract, instant coffee granules, ground cinnamon, sugar and a pinch of salt.
2. Beat with an electric mixer on high speed until the mixture holds its shape.
3. Refrigerate until ready to use.
Serve slices of pound cake with the coffee-cinnamon cream.
